title: 昨天做了什麼
scenario: talking about what you did yesterday

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我昨天早上先起床，然後刷牙洗臉，再吃早餐。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ zuótiān zǎoshang xiān qǐchuáng, ránhòu shuāyá xǐliǎn, zài chī zǎocān.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 zuo2tian1 zao3shang5 xian1 qi3chuang2, ran2hou4 shua1ya2 xi3lian3, zai4 chi1 zao3can1.
turns.translation_en: Yesterday morning I first got up, then brushed my teeth and washed my face, and then ate breakfast.
turns.translation_ko: 어제 아침에 먼저 일어나서, 이를 닦고 세수한 다음, 아침을 먹었어요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 然後我去公司上班，中午吃午餐，下午繼續工作。
turns.pinyin: Ránhòu wǒ qù gōngsī shàngbān, zhōngwǔ chī wǔcān, xiàwǔ jìxù gōngzuò.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ran2hou4 wo3 qu4 gong1si1 shang4ban1, zhong1wu3 chi1 wu3can1, xia4wu3 ji4xu4 gong1zuo4.
turns.translation_en: Then I went to the company to work, ate lunch at noon, and continued working in the afternoon.
turns.translation_ko: 그리고 회사에 출근해서 점심을 먹고, 오후에는 계속 일했어요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.pinyin: Nǐ xiàbān yǐhòu zuò le shénme?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 xia4ban1 yi3hou4 zuo4 le5 shen2me5?
turns.translation_en: What did you do after work?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我下班以後先回家，然後煮飯吃晚餐，最後看電視休息。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ xiàbān yǐhòu xiān huíjiā, ránhòu zhǔfàn chī wǎncān, zuìhòu kàn diànshì xiūxí.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 xia4ban1 yi3hou4 xian1 hui2jia1, ran2hou4 zhu3fan4 chi1 wan3can1, zui4hou4 kan4 dian4shi4 xiu1xi5.
turns.translation_en: After work I first went home, then cooked and ate dinner, and finally watched TV and rested.
turns.translation_ko: 퇴근 후에 먼저 집에 가서, 밥을 해서 저녁을 먹고, 마지막으로 TV를 보며 쉬었어요.

comprehension_questions.question_en: What did B do after getting up yesterday morning?
comprehension_questions.question_ko: B는 어제 아침에 일어난 후 무엇을 했습니까?

title: 昨天做了什麼？

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你昨天做了什麼？可以從頭開始說嗎？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ zuótiān zuò le shénme? Kěyǐ cóng tóu kāishǐ shuō ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 zuo2tian1 zuo4 le shen2me? Ke3yi3 cong2 tou2 kai1shi3 shuo1 ma?
turns.translation_en: What did you do yesterday? Can you tell me from the beginning?
turns.translation_ko: 어제 뭐 하셨어요? 처음부터 말씀해 주시겠어요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 好。昨天早上我先起床，然後刷牙洗臉，接著吃早餐。
turns.pinyin: Hǎo. Zuótiān zǎoshang wǒ xiān qǐchuáng, ránhòu shuāyá xǐliǎn, jiēzhe chī zǎocān.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3. Zuo2tian1 zao3shang4 wo3 xian1 qi3chuang2, ran2hou4 shua1ya2 xi3lian3, jie1zhe5 chi1 zao3can1.
turns.translation_en: Okay. Yesterday morning I first got up, then brushed my teeth and washed my face, and then ate breakfast.
turns.translation_ko: 네. 어제 아침에 먼저 일어나서, 이를 닦고 세수한 다음에 아침을 먹었어요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 然後我去公司上班，中午吃午餐，下午繼續工作，最後下班回家。

turns.pinyin_numeric: Ran2hou4 wo3 qu4 gong1si1 shang4ban1, zhong1wu3 chi1 wu3can1, xia4wu3 ji4xu4 gong1zuo4, zui4hou4 xia4ban1 hui2 jia1.
turns.translation_en: Then I went to the company to work, ate lunch at noon, continued working in the afternoon, and finally got off work and went home.

turns.speaker: A

turns.pinyin_numeric: You3. Hui2 jia1 yi3hou4, wo3 xian1 xiu1xi5 yi1xia4, ran2hou4 kan4 dian4shi4, jie1zhe5 xi3zao3, zui4hou4 shui4jiao4.

turns.text: 喂，你現在方便講電話嗎？
turns.pinyin: Wèi, nǐ xiànzài fāngbiàn jiǎng diànhuà ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wei4, ni3 xian4zai4 fang1bian4 jiang3 dian4hua4 ma?
turns.translation_en: Hey, is it convenient for you to talk on the phone now?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 不好意思，我現在正在開會，不方便講電話。
turns.pinyin: Bù hǎoyìsi, wǒ xiànzài zhèngzài kāihuì, bù fāngbiàn jiǎng diànhuà.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Bu4 hao3yi4si, wo3 xian4zai4 zheng4zai4 kai1hui4, bu4 fang1bian4 jiang3 dian4hua4.
turns.translation_en: Sorry, I'm in a meeting right now, so it's not convenient to talk.
turns.translation_ko: 죄송합니다, 지막 회의 중이라 통화하기 어려워요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 沒關係，不急。你什麼時候有空？
turns.pinyin: Méi guānxi, bù jí. Nǐ shénme shíhou yǒu kòng?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Mei2 guan1xi, bu4 ji2. Ni3 shen2me shi2hou you3 kong4?
turns.translation_en: No problem, it's not urgent. When will you be free?
turns.translation_ko: 괜찮아요, 급하지 않아요. 언제 시간 되세요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我大概再一個小時就開完會了。等一下再打給你，好嗎？
turns.pinyin: Wǒ dàgài zài yī ge xiǎoshí jiù kāi wán huì le. Děng yīxià zài dǎ gěi nǐ, hǎo ma?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 da4gai4 zai4 yi1 ge xiao3shi2 jiu4 kai1 wan2 hui4 le. Deng3 yi1xia4 zai4 da3 gei3 ni3, hao3 ma?
turns.translation_en: I'll probably finish the meeting in about an hour. I'll call you back later, okay?
turns.translation_ko: 한 시간쯤 후에 회의가 끝날 것 같아요. 나중에 다시 전화드릴게요, 괜찮으세요?

turns.speaker: A
turns.pinyin: Hǎo, nǐ mànmàn lái, bù jí.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Hao3, ni3 man4man4 lai2, bu4 ji2.
turns.translation_en: Okay, take your time, no rush.

title: 我正在複習中文

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我現在正在複習中文。明天有考試。

turns.translation_ko: 지금 중국어를 복습하고 있어요. 내일 시험이 있어요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 哇，你好認真。你複習了什麼？

turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 fu4xi2 le sheng1ci2 he2 ju4zi, ye3 lian4xi2 le xie3 zi4.

turns.translation_ko: 단어와 문장을 복습했고, 글자 쓰기도 연습했어요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.translation_en: Do you think Chinese is difficult?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 有一點難，可是很有意思。我喜歡學中文。
turns.pinyin: Yǒu yīdiǎn nán, kěshì hěn yǒu yìsi. Wǒ xǐhuān xué zhōngwén.
turns.pinyin_numeric: You3 yi1dian3 nan2, ke3shi4 hen3 you3 yi4si. Wo3 xi3huan1 xue2 zhong1wen2.
turns.translation_en: It's a little difficult, but very interesting. I like learning Chinese.
turns.translation_ko: 조금 어렵지만, 아주 재미있어요. 저는 중국어 배우는 것을 좋아해요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 加油！你一定可以考得很好。
turns.pinyin: Jiāyóu! Nǐ yīdìng kěyǐ kǎo dé hěn hǎo.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Jia1you2! Ni3 yi1ding4 ke3yi3 kao3 de2 hen3 hao3.
turns.translation_en: Keep it up! I'm sure you'll do well on the exam.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 謝謝你！希望明天考試順利。
turns.pinyin: Xièxiè nǐ! Xīwàng míngtiān kǎoshì shùnlì.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Xie4xie4 ni3! Xi1wang4 ming2tian1 kao3shi4 shun4li4.
turns.translation_en: Thank you! I hope the exam goes smoothly tomorrow.

turns.pinyin: Kěshì biàndāng de fènliàng bǐjiào duō, wǒ juéde bǐjiào huásuàn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ke3 shi4 bian4 dang1 de fen4 liang4 bi3 jiao4 duo1, wo3 jue2 de5 bi3 jiao4 hua2 suan4.
turns.translation_en: But the bento has a larger portion, I think it's more cost-effective.
turns.translation_ko: 그런데 도시락 양이 더 많아서 더划算한 것 같아요.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 對，便當的份量差不多是飯糰的兩倍，所以價格也差很多。
turns.pinyin: Duì, biàndāng de fènliàng chàbùduō shì fàntuán de liǎng bèi, suǒyǐ jiàgé yě chà hěnduō.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Dui4, bian4 dang1 de fen4 liang4 cha4 bu4 duo1 shi4 fan4 tuan2 de liang3 bei4, suo3 yi3 jia4 ge2 ye3 cha4 hen3 duo1.
turns.translation_en: Yes, the bento's portion is about twice that of the rice ball, so the price is also very different.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 도시락 양이 주먹밥의 약 두 배라서 가격도 많이 차이 나요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 那我決定買便當，因為比較值得。
turns.pinyin: Nà wǒ juédìng mǎi biàndāng, yīnwèi bǐjiào zhídé.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Na4 wo3 jue2 ding4 mai3 bian4 dang1, yin1 wei4 bi3 jiao4 zhi2 de2.
turns.translation_en: Then I decide to buy the bento, because it's more worth it.
turns.translation_ko: 그럼 도시락을 사기로 결정할게요, 더 가치 있으니까요.

comprehension_questions.question_en: What did the customer decide to buy?

shadowing_prompt: Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on the tone of comparison words like 比較 and 差不多.
free_response_prompt: Compare two items in a convenience store and explain which one you think is more cost-effective and why.

title: 哪個比較好？

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 這兩家餐廳，你覺得哪一家比較好？
turns.pinyin: Zhè liǎng jiā cāntīng, nǐ juéde nǎ yī jiā bǐjiào hǎo?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Zhe4 liang3 jia1 can1 ting1, ni3 jue2 de5 na3 yi1 jia1 bi3 jiao4 hao3?
turns.translation_en: Between these two restaurants, which one do you think is better?
turns.translation_ko: 이 두 식당 중에 어느 쪽이 더 좋다고 생각하세요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 第一家環境比較好，氣氛很舒服。第二家價格比較便宜，服務也不錯。
turns.pinyin: Dì yī jiā huánjìng bǐjiào hǎo, qìfēn hěn shūfú. Dì èr jiā jiàgé bǐjiào piányí, fúwù yě bùcuò.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Di4 yi1 jia1 huan2 jing4 bi3 jiao4 hao3, qi4 fen1 hen3 shu1 fu2. Di4 er4 jia1 jia4 ge2 bi3 jiao4 pian2 yi2, fu2 wu4 ye3 bu4 cuo4.
turns.translation_en: The first one has a better environment, the atmosphere is very comfortable. The second one has cheaper prices, and the service is not bad.
turns.translation_ko: 첫 번째 식당은 환경이 더 좋고 분위기가 아주 편안해요. 두 번째 식당은 가격이 더 싸고 서비스도 괜찮아요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 那味道呢？哪一家的菜比較好吃？
turns.pinyin: Nà wèidào ne? Nǎ yī jiā de cài bǐjiào hǎochī?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Na4 wei4 dao4 ne5? Na3 yi1 jia1 de cai4 bi3 jiao4 hao3 chi1?
turns.translation_en: What about the taste? Which restaurant's food is more delicious?
turns.translation_ko: 그럼 맛은요? 어느 식당 음식이 더 맛있어요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我覺得味道差不多，都很新鮮。不過第一家的份量比較少，第二家比較多。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ juéde wèidào chàbùduō, dōu hěn xīnxiān. Búguò dì yī jiā de fènliàng bǐjiào shǎo, dì èr jiā bǐjiào duō.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 jue2 de5 wei4 dao4 cha4 bu4 duo1, dou1 hen3 xin1 xian1. Bu2 guo4 di4 yi1 jia1 de fen4 liang4 bi3 jiao4 shao3, di4 er4 jia1 bi3 jiao4 duo1.
turns.translation_en: I think the taste is similar, both are very fresh. But the first one has smaller portions, the second one has larger portions.
turns.translation_ko: 맛은 비슷해요, 둘 다 아주 신선해요. 그런데 첫 번째는 양이 적고 두 번째는 양이 많아요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 這樣的話，我寧願去第二家，因為比較划算。
turns.pinyin: Zhèyàng dehuà, wǒ nìngyuàn qù dì èr jiā, yīnwèi bǐjiào huásuàn.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Zhe4 yang4 de5 hua4, wo3 ning4 yuan4 qu4 di4 er4 jia1, yin1 wei4 bi3 jiao4 hua2 suan4.
turns.translation_en: In that case, I'd rather go to the second one, because it's more cost-effective.
turns.translation_ko: 그렇다면 저는 두 번째 식당에 갈래요, 더划算하니까요.

free_response_prompt: Compare two restaurants you know and explain which one you prefer and why.

title: 台北和高雄的比較

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 你覺得台北和高雄有什麼不同？
turns.pinyin: Nǐ juéde Táiběi hé Gāoxióng yǒu shénme bùtóng?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Ni3 jue2 de5 Tai2 bei3 he2 Gao1 xiong2 you3 shen2 me5 bu4 tong2?
turns.translation_en: What differences do you think there are between Taipei and Kaohsiung?
turns.translation_ko: 타이베이와 가오슝은 어떤 차이가 있다고 생각하세요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 台北比較熱鬧，交通很方便，捷運路線很多。高雄比較安靜，環境很舒服。
turns.pinyin: Táiběi bǐjiào rènào, jiāotōng hěn fāngbiàn, jiéyùn lùxiàn hěnduō. Gāoxióng bǐjiào ānjìng, huánjìng hěn shūfú.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Tai2 bei3 bi3 jiao4 re4 nao4, jiao1 tong1 hen3 fang1 bian4, jie2 yun4 lu4 xian4 hen3 duo1. Gao1 xiong2 bi3 jiao4 an1 jing4, huan2 jing4 hen3 shu1 fu2.
turns.translation_en: Taipei is more lively, transportation is very convenient, and there are many MRT lines. Kaohsiung is quieter, and the environment is very comfortable.
turns.translation_ko: 타이베이는 더 번화하고 교통이 편리하며 지하철 노선이 많아요. 가오슝은 더 조용하고 환경이 편안해요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 那價格呢？台北的物價是不是比較貴？
turns.pinyin: Nà jiàgé ne? Táiběi de wùjià shì bùshì bǐjiào guì?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Na4 jia4 ge2 ne5? Tai2 bei3 de wu4 jia4 shi4 bu5 shi4 bi3 jiao4 gui4?
turns.translation_en: What about prices? Is the cost of living in Taipei more expensive?
turns.translation_ko: 그럼 가격은요? 타이베이 물가가 더 비싸지 않나요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 對，台北的價格比較高，尤其是餐廳和房子。高雄比較平價，同樣的東西便宜很多。
turns.pinyin: Duì, Táiběi de jiàgé bǐjiào gāo, yóuqí shì cāntīng hé fángzi. Gāoxióng bǐjiào píngjià, tóngyàng de dōngxi piányí hěnduō.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Dui4, Tai2 bei3 de jia4 ge2 bi3 jiao4 gao1, you2 qi2 shi4 can1 ting1 he2 fang2 zi5. Gao1 xiong2 bi3 jiao4 ping2 jia4, tong2 yang4 de dong1 xi5 pian2 yi2 hen3 duo1.
turns.translation_en: Yes, prices in Taipei are higher, especially for restaurants and housing. Kaohsiung is more affordable, the same things are much cheaper.
turns.translation_ko: 네, 타이베이는 가격이 더 높아요, 특히 식당과 집값이요. 가오슝은 더 저렴해서 같은 물건이 훨씬 싸요.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: 那你比較喜歡哪一個城市？
turns.pinyin: Nà nǐ bǐjiào xǐhuān nǎ yīge chéngshì?
turns.pinyin_numeric: Na4 ni3 bi3 jiao4 xi3 huan1 na3 yi1 ge4 cheng2 shi4?
turns.translation_en: Then which city do you prefer?
turns.translation_ko: 그럼 당신은 어느 도시를 더 좋아하세요?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: 我比較喜歡高雄，因為生活步調比較慢，壓力也比較小。
turns.pinyin: Wǒ bǐjiào xǐhuān Gāoxióng, yīnwèi shēnghuó bùdiào bǐjiào màn, yālì yě bǐjiào xiǎo.
turns.pinyin_numeric: Wo3 bi3 jiao4 xi3 huan1 Gao1 xiong2, yin1 wei4 sheng1 huo2 bu4 diao4 bi3 jiao4 man4, ya1 li4 ye3 bi3 jiao4 xiao3.
turns.translation_en: I prefer Kaohsiung, because the pace of life is slower and the stress is less.
turns.translation_ko: 저는 가오슝이 더 좋아요, 생활 속도가 더 느리고 스트레스도 덜하거든요.
